products.name: Nutri Rice Health Mix
products.subtitle: 30+ selected raw materials
products.description: A premium health mix crafted from 10 traditional rice varieties of Tamil Nadu, blended with power-packed pulses, premium dry fruits, and natural spices. Rich in nutrients, fibre, and antioxidants — perfect for the whole family.

products.name: Multi Millets Health Mix
products.subtitle: 30+ selected raw materials
products.description: A powerhouse blend of 9 ancient millet varieties combined with diverse pulses, nuts, and natural spices. Millets are superfoods packed with protein, iron, and dietary fibre — ideal for weight management and overall wellness.

products.name: Karuppu Urad Dal Kanji Mix
products.subtitle: 17 selected raw materials
products.description: Traditional Kanji/Kali mix made with Black & White Urad Dal, premium nuts, and warming spices. This age-old recipe supports digestion, boosts immunity, and provides sustained energy. Ready to mix with warm water or milk.

products.name: Multi Grain Atta
products.subtitle: Chapathi & Poori Flour
products.description: Nutritious multi-grain flour perfect for making healthy chapathis and pooris. A wholesome blend of grains that makes your everyday rotis more nutritious without compromising on taste.

products.name: Ellu Idly Podi
products.subtitle: Sesame Idly Powder
products.description: Traditional sesame-based idly podi with a rich nutty flavour. Mix with gingelly oil or ghee and enjoy with idly, dosa, or rice. Made fresh on order with no preservatives.

products.name: Moringa Idly Podi
products.subtitle: Moringa Leaves & Seeds Blend
products.description: A superfood podi made with moringa leaves blended with seeds. Moringa is called the miracle tree — packed with vitamins, minerals, and antioxidants. Ready to eat with steam rice with oil or ghee.

products.name: Indian Masala Chai Powder
products.subtitle: Traditional Chai Blend
products.description: An aromatic blend of traditional Indian spices to make the perfect masala chai. Just add a spoonful to your regular tea for a fragrant, immunity-boosting cup.

products.name: Premium Tea
products.subtitle: From 7th Heaven, Valparai
products.description: Finest quality tea sourced directly from the lush tea gardens of Valparai. Available in multiple grades to suit every palate and budget.

products.name: Flavoured Tea
products.subtitle: Ellachi, Ginger, Masala & Chocolate
products.description: Delightful flavoured teas that bring a new dimension to your daily tea ritual. Choose from Ellachi (Cardamom), Ginger, Masala blend, or indulgent Chocolate tea.

products.name: Green Tea
products.subtitle: Valparai Green Tea Leaf & Dust
products.description: Pure green tea sourced from Valparai's finest estates. Rich in antioxidants and catechins, green tea supports metabolism and weight management.

products.name: Pure Filter Coffee
products.subtitle: 100% Pure South Indian Coffee
products.description: Authentic South Indian filter coffee powder for the perfect traditional brew. Rich aroma, bold flavour — just like home.

products.name: Natural Honey
products.subtitle: Pure & Unprocessed
products.description: Pure, unprocessed natural honey with all its beneficial enzymes and nutrients intact. No artificial sweeteners or additives.

products.name: Manjal Kuliyal Podi
products.subtitle: 25 Traditional Herbal Ingredients
products.description: A traditional turmeric bath powder made from 25 carefully chosen herbs. Brightens skin, reduces blemishes, and leaves skin glowing and fragrant.

products.name: Nalangu Maavu
products.subtitle: Traditional Bath Powder for All Genders
products.description: Traditional Nalangu Maavu used in Tamil wedding rituals and daily skincare. Cleanses, softens, and nourishes skin. Suitable for men, women, and children.

products.name: Maruthani Powder
products.subtitle: Natural Henna (Mehendi)
products.description: Pure, natural henna powder made from fresh henna leaves. Rich colour, cooling properties that soothe the scalp and condition hair naturally.

products.name: Rose Powder & Oil Massage
products.subtitle: Rose Petal Skin Care
products.description: Luxurious rose petal powder and massage oil for radiant, soft skin. Hydrating, anti-aging, and wonderfully fragrant.

products.name: Aloe Vera Gel
products.subtitle: 3 Natural Ingredients
products.description: Pure aloe vera gel with just 3 natural ingredients. No parabens, no sulphates. Perfect as daily moisturiser, after-sun soother, hair gel, and spot treatment.

products.name: Herbal Shampoo
products.subtitle: Shikakai Blend - 15 Raw Materials
products.description: Traditional shikakai-based herbal shampoo from 15 natural herbs. Gently cleanses while nourishing the scalp and strengthening hair. Free from SLS and parabens.

products.name: Organic Hair Dye Powder
products.subtitle: Chemical-free Natural Hair Colour
products.description: 100% organic hair dye from natural plant-based ingredients. Covers grey hair naturally while conditioning and strengthening. No ammonia, no peroxide.

products.name: New Born Baby & Mom Combo
products.subtitle: Special Postpartum Care Gift
products.description: A thoughtfully curated combo for new mothers and their babies. Includes traditional postpartum care products trusted by generations of Tamil families.

products.name: Magic Combo
products.subtitle: Health & Beauty Bundle
products.description: A magical combination of our best-selling health and beauty products. An ideal gift for health-conscious friends and family.

products.name: Kids Combo
products.subtitle: Nutrition & Care for Little Ones
products.description: A specially designed combo for kids with nutritious health mixes and gentle natural care products. Everything is kid-safe, natural, and supports healthy growth.

products.name: Elegant Combo
products.subtitle: Classic Beauty Essentials
products.description: An elegant collection of traditional beauty essentials for the modern woman. Timeless recipes, pure ingredients, and beautiful packaging.

products.name: Dark Spot & Pimple Care Combo
products.subtitle: Targeted Skin Treatment
products.description: A targeted skincare combo using traditional herbal remedies for dark spots and acne-prone skin. Natural, effective, and gentle.

products.name: Lovely Day Combo
products.subtitle: Self-care Gift Set
products.description: Start every day feeling lovely with this curated self-care combo. A thoughtful blend of natural products to brighten mornings.
